Localization.Description: A virtual machine snapshot is created

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Snapshot "{object.value}" of virtual machine "{object.name}" is being created on host {event_src.host}
Snapshot "{object.value}" of virtual machine "{object.name}" is created on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create snapshot "{object.value}" of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
